hero.eyebrow: Software · Cyber AIOps · Security · Agentic AI
hero.headline: Architecting the digital landscape of tomorrow.
hero.subhead: Cloud, modernization, security, and agent-native software for enterprises, financial institutions, and government — delivered into production, not parked in a slide deck.

positioning.title: Software, security, and Agentic AI — engineered for the modern enterprise.
positioning.body: Vergent designs, builds, and runs the systems enterprises depend on — and the AI agents that increasingly run alongside them. From cloud architecture to cyber operations to autonomous workflows, the throughline is the same: outcomes you can measure in production.

approach.title: Embedded with your team. Accountable to outcomes.
approach.body: We don't drop binders and disappear. Vergent teams sit alongside yours — defining the work, shipping it, and owning the result through go-live and beyond.

disciplines.title: Reference architecture
disciplines.summary: End-to-end designs across cloud, security, data, and agentic systems — frameworks-aligned and audit-ready.

disciplines.title: Production & eval engineering
disciplines.summary: CI/CD, observability, and the eval suites that keep platforms — and the agents on top of them — reliable in production.

disciplines.title: Cyber AIOps & SOC
disciplines.summary: AI-driven detection, response, and continuous control monitoring across hybrid and multi-cloud estates.

disciplines.title: Licence & cloud cost rationalisation
disciplines.summary: IT licence audits and cloud-spend reviews that reclaim budget and surface contract risk before renewal.

disciplines.title: Delivery & vendor management
disciplines.summary: A single accountable owner across SIs, internal teams, and external partners — through go-live and beyond.

disciplines.title: Sourcing & contracts
disciplines.summary: Supplier selection and negotiation — leverage on your side of the table.

cta.title: Have a transformation in motion or about to start?
cta.body: A short note about what you're working on goes a long way. We come back inside two business days.
cta.label: Get in touch
